title: Unsung Heroes: How a Mysuru government school teacher used AI and drones to bring tech revolution in Hinkal
description: On 5 September, 2025, Madhusudhan received the national award for the best teacher from President Droupadi Murmu for using AI and technology in teaching. The same year, he also received the best teacher award from Karnataka government.

title: ‘I thought it was AI': Video shows bear at front doorstep of Santa Clarita home
description: A Santa Clarita family was notified about an unexpected visitor Friday morning when video from their Ring camera showed a bear in their front yard.

title: Industry leaders call for resilient telecom networks powered by satellite, AI and fiber to drive India's digital future
description: On World Telecommunication and Information Society Day 2026, stakeholders in the telecom and digital services sectors stated that India’s digital growth relies on secure, scalable, and resilient communication networks

title: 'AI Fundamentals Training' held at MPM Govt First Grade College, Karkala
description: Media Release Karkala, May 16: The IQAC and Placement Cell of MPM Government First Grade College, Karkala, in association with UPFRONT, in collaboration with AVPN, Anudip Foundation for Social Welfare, Google.org and Asian Development Bank (ADB), successfully organised the 'AI Fundamenta....

title: Korean robotics, AI firms interested in Việt Nam
description: KOTRA said it is teaming up with the Korea Institute for Robot Industry Advancement to run the “K-Robot Pavilion"” at the 23rd Việt Nam International Exhibition on Machinery, Equipment, Technology and Industrial Products (VINAMAC EXPO 2026) in Hà Nội from May 14-16.
